top_issues: DFM warnings indicate likely setup tuning during early line stabilization.
recommended_actions: Confirm inspection ownership for connector access, mounting pattern, and critical dimensions.
Review automation candidates: auto screw presentation, vision-assisted bend-angle check, inline barcode traceability
Use the process sequence as a preliminary launch planning aid, then validate with site-specific PFMEA and layout data.

summary.heuristics_notice: Process plan is generated from part/process heuristics and requires site-specific validation.

assumptions: Decision scope: design review and pilot-line planning

process_flow.purpose: Receive coil or blank and confirm surface condition.
Create primary outline and connector cut-outs.
Generate bracket geometry and maintain datum stability.
Complete mounting features and hardware prep.
Remove sharp edges and contamination before assembly.
Verify bend angle, hole pattern, and mounting stack-up.
Protect cosmetic faces and release to downstream build.
